headline: AMD’s UK AI Supercomputers Put Sovereign And Research Role In Focus
summary: AMD (NasdaqGS:AMD) has announced a multi billion pound investment in AI supercomputers and related infrastructure in the UK. The plan includes partnerships with Dell, the University of Cambridge, UK Atomic Energy Authority, Imperial College, and Oriole Networks. The projects aim to support sovereign AI capabilities, fusion research, and national computing capacity for science and industry. For investors tracking semiconductor and AI infrastructure companies, this move puts AMD's UK presence...

headline: Super Micro Plunges 11%, Dell Sinks 9% as High-Beta AI Hardware Stocks Get Hit
summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) are down 11% at midday Tuesday, while Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) is sliding 9%. Both high-beta AI hardware names are getting hit in a coordinated risk-off move across the AI infrastructure complex. The selling comes as the broader market also weakens, with the S&P 500 ETF down 1.5% to 2% ... Super Micro Plunges 11%, Dell Sinks 9% as High-Beta AI Hardware Stocks Get Hit

headline: Dell, HPE seen well positioned for AI and enterprise demand despite stock gains
summary: Investing.com -- Dell Technologies and Hewlett Packard Enterprise remain attractive plays on both artificial intelligence infrastructure spending and a recovering enterprise hardware market, even after sharp gains in their share prices this year, Barclays said in a research note on Tuesday.

headline: Meet the Parabolic 7. The Group Leaving the Mag 7 in the Dust
